tools.name: plainweave_baseline_diff
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local baseline drift facts; it does not make release decisions.

tools.name: plainweave_baseline_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns one local immutable baseline snapshot.

tools.name: plainweave_baseline_list
tools.authority_boundary: Lists local immutable baselines without creating or changing snapshots.

tools.name: plainweave_entity_intent_context_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local entity-to-intent context for peer planning; live peer identity resolution is explicit unavailable state.

tools.name: plainweave_intent_corpus
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local readable intent corpus rows; no consolidation verdict is made.

tools.name: plainweave_intent_coverage
tools.authority_boundary: Returns the local north-star coverage fact (% of public surfaces that answer 'why does this exist?'), qualified by denominator completeness; it is advisory and makes no pass/fail verdict.

tools.name: plainweave_intent_orphans
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local missing-justification facts; it does not decide release readiness.

tools.name: plainweave_intent_trace
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local code-up/down intent graph neighbors without creating accepted truth.

tools.name: plainweave_loomweave_catalog_list
tools.authority_boundary: Reads Loomweave local catalog identity snapshots without mutating Plainweave or Loomweave.

tools.name: plainweave_preflight_facts_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns scoped Plainweave facts for Legis preflight; contains no governance verdicts.

tools.name: plainweave_project_context_get
tools.authority_boundary: Reports local Plainweave project context and read-only capability metadata.

tools.name: plainweave_requirement_dossier_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns the local computed dossier; live peer calls are not made in P0.

tools.name: plainweave_requirement_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns one local requirement record; active drafts remain separate from approved truth.

tools.name: plainweave_requirement_search
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local requirement records without changing authority state.

tools.name: plainweave_requirements_enrichment_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local Plainweave requirement facts for Warpline's reserved enrichment slot as present|absent|unavailable; an identity gap is 'unavailable' (cannot tell), never 'absent'. No verdict; Plainweave owns requirements.

tools.name: plainweave_trace_link_list
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local trace links with state, authority, and freshness preserved.

tools.name: plainweave_verification_status_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns derived local verification status and evidence freshness.

tools.name: plainweave_verification_status_list
tools.authority_boundary: Lists local unverified or stale verification statuses without recording evidence.

tools.name: plainweave_wardline_peer_facts_list
tools.authority_boundary: Reads Wardline's local findings snapshots as advisory peer facts; it runs no scan, makes no trust decision, and emits no verdict. Wardline owns trust policy.
